name: Beyond Sufficiency: Time Series Explanation with Counterfactual Necessity
summary: arXiv:2607.21573v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Faithful explanations of time-series classifiers should identify subsequences that are not only sufficient to preserve a black-box model's predicti...
description: arXiv:2607.21573v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Faithful explanations of time-series classifiers should identify subsequences that are not only sufficient to preserve a black-box model's prediction, but also necessary for maintaining it. However, existing sufficiency-oriented methods can assign high importance to spurious subsequences that support the prediction without being essential to the...
author: Hongnan Ma, Yiwei Shi, Mengyue Yang, Weiru Liu
